data.title: South Korea Intensifies Efforts to Combat Tax Evasion in Cryptocurrency
data.description:
According to PANews, South Korea's National Tax Service is intensifying its efforts to combat tax evasion, warning that cryptocurrency assets stored in cold wallets may also be subject to seizure. Officials have stated that if there is suspicion of tax evaders hiding crypto assets offline, they will conduct home searches and confiscate hard drives and cold wallet devices. Under the National Tax Collection Act, the tax authority can request account information from local exchanges, freeze accounts, and liquidate assets to cover tax liabilities.

While cold wallets provide security for cryptocurrency assets, they can also be used to conceal assets, complicating tax collection efforts. As of June, the number of cryptocurrency investors in South Korea has reached nearly 11 million, marking an increase of almost 800% since 2020. During the same period, trading volume surged from 1 trillion won (approximately $730 million) to 6.4 trillion won (around $4.7 billion).

The widespread adoption of cryptocurrencies has led to an increase in tax evasion cases. In 2021, the first operation resulted in the seizure of approximately $50 million in cryptocurrencies, and over the past four years, $108 million has been seized and liquidated.

data.title: Democrats Propose ‘Restricted List’ for DeFi Protocols in Bill That Could ‘Kill’ Sector
data.description:
Senate Democrats sent Republicans a counter-proposal permitting Treasury to create a restricted list for DeFi protocols with Know Your Customer rules on crypto frontends, triggering immediate halt to bipartisan negotiations as industry leaders warn it could push innovation offshore.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/democrats-propose-restricted-list-for-defi-protocols-in-bill-that-could-kill-sector/

data.title: Bitcoin Traders Show Optimism Amid Strong Support Levels
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Greeks.live researcher Adam shared on social media that the English-speaking community is exhibiting a bullish stance on Bitcoin (BTC). There is strong confidence in the $122,000 support level, with most traders actively selling put options and anticipating that the price will reach an all-time high.

data.title: GMGN: Some tokens on the BSC FLAP Launchpad have contract risks
data.description: GMGN announced on the X platform that the team has received user feedback regarding potential contractual risks with some tokens listed on the BSC FLAP Launchpad. These tokens are configured with dynamic tax rates, which in some cases can result in a 100% sell tax, making them unsaleable. For users who haven't manually set any filters, FLAP has been removed from the default filter. All traders of meme tokens issued through FLAP are urged to exercise caution and be aware of potential trading risks.

data.title: BTC Futures Open Interest Remains High Amid Market Volatility
data.description: According to Foresight News, analysis by Glassnode indicates that BTC futures open interest remains elevated as both bulls and bears face significant price fluctuations. The market is undergoing a leverage reset, with volatility impacting excess positions on both sides.

data.title: Four.Meme Faces Data Access Issues Amid High Traffic
data.description:
According to PANews, Four.Meme reported on the X platform that the platform is experiencing data access issues due to unusually high traffic. The technical team has initiated emergency repair and optimization processes.

Earlier reports indicated that Four.Meme had been down for over half an hour.

data.title: UK Retail Investment Platform Warns of Cryptocurrency Risks Amid Regulatory Changes
data.description: According to PANews, Hargreaves Lansdown, the largest retail investment platform in the UK, has issued a warning regarding the risks associated with cryptocurrency exposure for British investors. Despite a shift in regulatory stance, the platform emphasized that Bitcoin lacks intrinsic value. This week, Hargreaves Lansdown noted that the UK's Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has lifted a four-year ban, allowing retail investors to hold regulated cryptocurrency products. However, the platform argues that cryptocurrencies do not possess the characteristics necessary for inclusion in investment portfolios aimed at growth or income, and should not be relied upon to achieve financial goals, stating that "Bitcoin is not an asset class." Nonetheless, Hargreaves Lansdown has not ruled out the possibility of offering cryptocurrency products on its platform. Starting early next year, select individuals will be allowed access to such products, contingent upon passing suitability tests. The platform plans to assess customer demand and risk considerations over the coming months.

data.title: Metaplanet temporarily suspends stock purchase rights for phases 20-22 to optimize Bitcoin accumulation strategy
data.description: Simon Gerovich stated in a post on the X platform that Metaplanet has established a solid foundation for growth and is well-positioned to leverage a variety of financing tools. To optimize its financing strategy, the company is temporarily suspending the 20th-22nd round of stock purchase rights to continue expanding its Bitcoin holdings and maximizing Bitcoin returns.

data.title: Crypto Salaries Drop Across All Roles Despite Bitcoin Rally – Only 10% of Jobs Are Entry-Level
data.description:
Crypto salaries and token incentives declined across nearly all roles in 2024-Q1 2025 despite Bitcoin's rally according to Dragonfly Capital's report, with entry-level positions accounting for only 10% of jobs while founder compensation surged 37% to $197,000 annually.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-salaries-drop-across-all-roles-despite-bitcoin-rally-only-10-of-jobs-are-entry-level/

data.title: A certain address traded 6 BSC Meme coins in 24 hours, losing $255,000
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, a certain address (0x7f8...b3dc) traded six meme coins in the past 24 hours, resulting in a total loss of $255,000 and a 0% win rate. The address initially traded tokens such as T4, Binance Pattern, BNBBuilder, BNBHolder, and Meme Rush, losing $97,000. Subsequently, the address spent $472,000 to purchase 18.5 million Xiuxian coins, becoming the largest holder of the coin. The address subsequently sold most of the Xiuxian coins at a loss of $160,000.

data.title: Pudgy Penguins partners with Sanctum to launch LST penguSOL
data.description: Pudgy Penguins announced on the X platform that it has partnered with Sanctum to launch LST (penguSOL). Users can stake SOL on the Pengu validator to earn returns and support PENGU, with no lock-up period for their SOL.

data.title: LBank Releases Q3 Report: Transaction Volume Increases 71%, Users Surpass 20 Million
data.description: LBank released its Q3 2025 platform report, showing an average daily trading volume of $8.5 billion, a 71% month-over-month increase, and surpassing 20 million registered users worldwide. The platform became a sponsor of the Argentine national football team and launched a $100 million bonus program, deeply integrating the passion of football with Web 3 innovation and accelerating its global expansion. The report reveals that LBank launched 288 assets during the quarter, with initial offerings accounting for 46.88%. Of these, 12.85% saw returns exceeding 10x, and 1.39% saw 100x returns. Assets in the LBANK EDGE zone saw an average increase of 1,837%, while tokens launched through LBmeme Launch saw an average increase of 6,382%. Pre-market trading projects achieved a maximum return of 99x, and 25 airdrops distributed a total of $1.52 million. The platform also launched innovative products such as coin-to-share trading, LBmeme Launch, and BoostHub, continuously strengthening its new asset discovery and user incentive mechanisms. Additionally, LBank Labs hosted the Global Blockchain Forum and "1001 Festival Seoul" in South Korea. The platform was named a "Top 7 Exchange" by Bitcoin.com News, significantly enhancing its brand influence. Regarding security, LBank has prevented over 2,500 potential security incidents, preventing over $300 million in potential losses. It has also entered into a strategic partnership with CertiK Skynet to further enhance security transparency and real-time risk monitoring capabilities.
